title: Credit Analyst
description: BCG seeks a Credit Analyst to evaluate creditworthiness and support lending decisions.
responsibilities: Analyze financial statements and creditworthiness of loan applicants
Prepare credit analysis reports and recommendations
Monitor credit risk and loan portfolio performance
Conduct financial ratio analysis and forecasting
Support credit policy development and compliance
Communicate findings to senior credit officers

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
